meta.description: Smell index for React. Maps to rubric.json rule_ref.

smells.name: Conditional hook call
smells.summary: useState/useEffect/etc. called inside if/for, breaking hook order.

smells.name: Stale effect closure
smells.summary: useEffect deps array omits values read inside the effect.

smells.name: Index as list key
smells.summary: Array index used for key in a list that can reorder or mutate.

smells.name: setState without updater
smells.summary: Next state computed from current state without the functional form.

smells.name: Async effect without cleanup
smells.summary: fetch or timer in useEffect without AbortController or cleanup flag.

smells.name: Inline literal prop
smells.summary: Fresh object/array literal passed to a memoised child each render.

smells.name: Div as button
smells.summary: Click handler on non-interactive element without role or keyboard support.

smells.name: Prop mirrored into state
smells.summary: useState + useEffect used to mirror a prop; compute instead.

smells.name: Controlled/uncontrolled flip
smells.summary: Input toggles between value and undefined.

smells.name: Positive: stable memoised render
smells.summary: React.memo with useCallback handlers on a hot path.

smells.name: Context for local state
smells.summary: Context storing frequently changing UI state causes cascade renders.
